Privacy-first data marketplace

Own your data. Earn from it on your terms.

Sovrn helps individuals monetize consented, privacy-protected data while giving buyers access to transparent, high-quality datasets.

Featured dataset

Houston Connectivity Signals

Aggregated device and network context from opted-in contributors, packaged for privacy-safe buyer analysis.

Region

Houston Metro

Refresh

Daily refresh

Privacy

Aggregated • consent-backed

Use cases

Mobility analytics, network planning, consumer behavior research

How Sovrn works

A simple flow for contributors and buyers.

1

Connect your data

2

Choose what to share

3

Sovrn transforms it into buyer-ready datasets

4

Buyers request access

5

You earn when your data creates value

What you control

Contributors stay in charge of the data shared, the buyers who request access, and how they participate in the marketplace.

Data categories

Control which data categories you share and keep private.

Buyer access

Buyers request access before any dataset export is shared.

Marketplace participation

Opt in only when you are ready to make contributions available.

Payout preferences

Set how and when you receive earnings from approved data sales.

Revocation and deletion

Leave or remove your data from the marketplace at any time.

What buyers get

Buyers can discover datasets with clear sourcing, freshness, privacy treatment, and use case alignment.

Aggregated datasets

Access decision-ready insights without individual-level records.

Transparent coverage

See region, contributor scale, and use case signals clearly.

Freshness indicators

Choose datasets by latency, refresh cadence, and recent activity.

Consent-backed sourcing

Every product is built from explicit contributor opt-in.

Sample previews

Review privacy-safe sample data before requesting access.

Use-case filters

Search by analytics need, geography, and business intent.

✓

You control what you share

✓

Buyers request access

✓

Data is packaged for privacy, quality, and transparency

✓

Revoke access anytime

✓

No hidden resale

Choose your path and we’ll keep you updated as the marketplace grows.
